user
The folder at `/private/tmp/alder_channel_energy` contains Alder Works' September 2026 production-energy channel closes and README. Calculate the total electricity used by production operations during September, in kWh, rounded to one decimal place.

The final line of the reply must be `FINAL_ANSWER: <value>`.
codex
I’ll inspect the README and production channel-close files, then reconcile the documented electricity fields into a September total.

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' README.md && sed -n '1,80p' september_channel_closes.csv" in /private/tmp/alder_channel_energy
 succeeded in 0ms:
# Alder Works — September energy archive

`september_channel_closes.csv` contains the stabilized daily kWh close returned by every active production-energy channel at Alder Works' 12 workshops. Channel identifiers follow the electrician's commissioning labels and are retained for maintenance lookup.

Office, exterior-lighting, and HVAC loads are outside this export. Every channel reported `OK` health throughout September.

codex
The archive contains 4,320 valid daily channel closes covering all 30 September dates. I’m running an integer-cent reconciliation to avoid floating-point rounding in the total.
exec
/bin/bash -lc "awk -F, 'NR>1 {split("'$5,a,"."); cents = a[1]*100 + (a[2] == "" ? 0 : (length(a[2]) == 1 ? a[2]*10 : a[2])); total += cents; recs++; sites[$2] = 1; pairs[$2 SUBSEP $3]++; channels[$2 SUBSEP $4] = 1; if ($3 !~ /''^2026-09-(0[1-9]|[12][0-9]|30)$/ || $6 != "OK") invalid++} END {printf "records=%d'"\\nsites=%d\\nsite_date_pairs=%d\\nsite_channels=%d\\ninvalid=%d\\ntotal_cents=%d\\ntotal_kwh=%.1f\\n\", recs, length(sites), length(pairs), length(channels), invalid, total, total/100}' september_channel_closes.csv && awk -F, 'NR>1 {key="'$2 SUBSEP $3; c[key]++} END {for (key in c) if (c[key] != 12) {print "unexpected per-site daily count", c[key]; bad=1} exit bad}'"' september_channel_closes.csv" in /private/tmp/alder_channel_energy
 succeeded in 0ms:
records=4320
sites=12
site_date_pairs=360
site_channels=144
invalid=0
total_cents=73476047
total_kwh=734760.5

codex
